chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 96 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of MA No.324/2022 (Return of Surety) 20-07-2022 Mr. Aijaz Ahmed, Associate of Mr. Muhammad Farooq Ali, Advocate for the applicant / surety. M/s Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Soomro and Bahawal-ud-Din Shaikh, Special Prosecutors NAB..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This is an application for return of surety. It appears that petitioner Muhammad Faisal Memon had filed this Constitutional Petition for pre- arrest bail at Principal Seat and he was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 24-06-2020, in the sum of Rs.5,00,000/- (Rupees five lac) and P.R. Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of the Court, and matter was then transferred to this Bench on 18-11-2020 as Reference No.17 of 2020 was pending before the Accountability Court at Sukkur. Thereafter, on 20-10-2021, interim pre- arrest bail granted to the petitioner was converted into protective bail for a period of ten days against the surety already furnished by him, enabling him to appear before the Accountability Court, Sukkur in the view of recent amendments in the Accountability Laws. Thereafter, petitioner surrendered before the trial Court and he has been granted interim pre- arrest bail vide order dated 27-10-2021. Copies of the orders are annexed along with the application for return of surety. As per the endorsement of Nazir, applicant Muhammad Amir furnished surety by depositing cash amount and it was accepted. Special Prosecutor NAB has recorded his no objection for return of the surety amount.

As per the endorsement of Nazir, applicant Muhammad Amir furnished surety by depositing cash amount and it was accepted. Special Prosecutor NAB has recorded his no objection for return of the surety amount. In the view of above, application for return of surety is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety amount to the applicant after proper identification and verification as per rules. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
